title: Add Wycheproof ECDH conformance tests
description: Create wolfcrypt-conformance/tests/wycheproof_ecdh.rs testing NistEcdhSecret against Wycheproof ecpoint-format vectors. Test vectors: ecdh_secp256r1_ecpoint_test.json (P-256) and ecdh_secp384r1_ecpoint_test.json (P-384). Format: each test case has 'private' (hex raw scalar), 'public' (hex uncompressed EC point, 04||x||y), 'shared' (expected shared secret x-coord), 'result' (valid/invalid/acceptable). Test logic: import private scalar via from_private_scalar(), import public point via NistEcdhPublicKey::from_bytes(), call diffie_hellman(), assert result matches expected shared secret for valid cases; assert error for invalid cases. Add NistEcdhEcpointTestGroup / NistEcdhEcpointTestCase structs to helpers/wycheproof.rs. Gate the test file on #![cfg(all(wolfssl_ecc))].
